summary: Archive game inning markers - Hide Spoilers ON
description: GIVEN a user has Hide Spoilers ON

steps.action: WHEN a user watches the archive game from the beginning
steps.result:
THEN inning markers are not displayed in the scrubber
AND as the half innings begin, inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar to the left of the playhead
AND the inning number indicates the beginning of the top of the inning
AND a down arrow indicates the beginning of the bottom of the inning
